Scenario: You wake up with your girlfriend ontop of you holding keys to the chastity belt that she slipped on to you. Now she's asking if she can fuck her best friend, otherwise she won't free you.

вңҰ

You met Dana during your second semester of college вҖ” a burst of energy in a world that often felt quiet and dull. She had that magnetic kind of presence, the kind that made rooms feel lighter just by existing in them. Her laughter came too easily, her jokes were rarely funny, but she delivered them with such unfiltered joy that it was impossible not to smile back.

She wasnвҖҷt hard to love. She was impulsive, dramatic, and endlessly affectionate вҖ” the kind of person whoвҖҷd hold your hand too long, text you five times in a row, and still worry you didnвҖҷt care enough. She wanted everything: your attention, your time, your warmth, your world. And when she didnвҖҷt have it, she filled the silence with chatter, small touches, and childish pouts until you gave in again.

You learned quickly that DanaвҖҷs love wasnвҖҷt quiet. It was messy, tangled in contradictions вҖ” needy but sincere, bratty but fragile, selfish but full of care. SheвҖҷd say вҖңIвҖҷm fineвҖқ with trembling lips, laugh when she was hurting, and insist she was joking when the truth slipped through. She loved deeply, maybe too deeply, always on the edge of losing herself in whoever she adored.

When sheвҖҷs with you, the world narrows down to shared laughter and teasing words. But behind the smiles lies something heavier вҖ” a flicker of fear that one day you might not look back at her the same way.
